title: Soy Familia Soy Michoacano
overview: A tragic event marks the life of a family from Michoacán, Mexico, pushing them toward a path of revenge rather than justice. Refusing to wait for the law to act, they decide to take matters into their own hands.  As they pursue those responsible, they are drawn deeper into a world filled with betrayal, hidden truths, and unforeseen consequences. What begins as a quest for vengeance soon reveals a devastating surprise that destiny has prepared for them.  A story of drama and suspense, where loyalty is tested and every decision carries a heavy price.
